## Checklist

- [ ] Agent entry added to `registry/agents.json` with all required fields
- [ ] `author` and `url` fields present
- [ ] `npm_package` exists and is published on npm
- [ ] Handoff workflow created at `src/workflows/handoff-{id}.md`
- [ ] Init workflow updated in `src/workflows/init.md`
- [ ] Tested locally (`npm test` passes)
- [ ] Changelog entry added
